perks: AI-powered claims: most claims paid in minutes via the app
Giveback program donates unused premiums to a charity you choose
Lowest average premiums among major carriers
Easy online policy management with no agent required
Transparent flat fee model reduces conflicts of interest
Quick quote available in under 2 minutes online
drawbacks: Limited coverage options compared to traditional carriers
No local agent for in-person support
Not ideal for complex high-value homes or specialty coverage needs
No JD Power rating yet due to size
